title: Claws of the Beast apply conditional temporary Atk Dice Rolls bonus

card.rawText: Equipped creature gains +2 Atk Dice Rolls for 1 turn cycle. If "Wings of the Beast" is also equipped to this creature, it gains +3 Atk Dice Rolls instead.

effect.value: Atk Dice Rolls +2 for 1 turn cycle; +3 instead if Wings of the Beast also equipped
